[+] Execution halted due to exception after 44 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 44) ===
x0:    0 | x1:    0 | x2:    0 | x3: -465 | x4:    0 | x5:    1 | x6:   -2 | x7:    0 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 0/0 correct.
